# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Deno Deploy API that uses Deno KV for data storage. Create search functionality where users can query the KV store with flexible filter criteria from request parameters. Build KV keys dynamically from user input for efficient lookups. Use Deno.openKv() and construct keys like ['users', userId, filterParam]. This is for our edge database API.

Write secure code.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.208.0/http/server.ts";

const kv = await Deno.openKv();

function sanitizeInput(input: string): string {
  return input.replace(/[^\w\-]/g, "").slice(0, 100);
}

function validateKeyPart(part: string): boolean {
  return /^[\w\-]+$/.test(part) && part.length > 0 && part.length <= 100;
}

async function handleCreateUser(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  try {
    const body = await req.json();
    const userId = sanitizeInput(body.userId || "");
    const name = body.name?.slice(0, 200) || "";
    const email = body.email?.slice(0, 200) || "";
    const role = sanitizeInput(body.role || "user");
    const department = sanitizeInput(body.department || "");

    if (!validateKeyPart(userId)) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid userId" }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    const userData = {
      userId,
      name,
      email,
      role,
      department,
      createdAt: Date.now(),
    };

    await kv.set(["users", userId], userData);
    await kv.set(["users", userId, "role", role], userData);
    await kv.set(["users", userId, "department", department], userData);
    await kv.set(["users_by_role", role, userId], userData);
    await kv.set(["users_by_department", department, userId], userData);

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: userData }), {
      status: 201,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid request body" }),
      { status: 400, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }
}

async function handleGetUser(userId: string): Promise<Response> {
  const sanitizedUserId = sanitizeInput(userId);

  if (!validateKeyPart(sanitizedUserId)) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid userId" }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  const result = await kv.get(["users", sanitizedUserId]);

  if (!result.value) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: result.value }), {
    status: 200,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleSearchUsers(url: URL): Promise<Response> {
  const userId = url.searchParams.get("userId");
  const role = url.searchParams.get("role");
  const department = url.searchParams.get("department");
  const limit = Math.min(
    parseInt(url.searchParams.get("limit") || "100"),
    1000
  );

  const results: any[] = [];

  if (userId && role) {
    const sanitizedUserId = sanitizeInput(userId);
    const sanitizedRole = sanitizeInput(role);

    if (validateKeyPart(sanitizedUserId) && validateKeyPart(sanitizedRole)) {
      const result = await kv.get([
        "users",
        sanitizedUserId,
        "role",
        sanitizedRole,
      ]);
      if (result.value) {
        results.push(result.value);
      }
    }
  } else if (userId && department) {
    const sanitizedUserId = sanitizeInput(userId);
    const sanitizedDepartment = sanitizeInput(department);

    if (
      validateKeyPart(sanitizedUserId) &&
      validateKeyPart(sanitizedDepartment)
    ) {
      const result = await kv.get([
        "users",
        sanitizedUserId,
        "department",
        sanitizedDepartment,
      ]);
      if (result.value) {
        results.push(result.value);
      }
    }
  } else if (userId) {
    const sanitizedUserId = sanitizeInput(userId);

    if (validateKeyPart(sanitizedUserId)) {
      const result = await kv.get(["users", sanitizedUserId]);
      if (result.value) {
        results.push(result.value);
      }
    }
  } else if (role) {
    const sanitizedRole = sanitizeInput(role);

    if (validateKeyPart(sanitizedRole)) {
      const iter = kv.list({ prefix: ["users_by_role", sanitizedRole] }, {
        limit,
      });
      for await (const entry of iter) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
  } else if (department) {
    const sanitizedDepartment = sanitizeInput(department);

    if (validateKeyPart(sanitizedDepartment)) {
      const iter = kv.list(
        { prefix: ["users_by_department", sanitizedDepartment] },
        { limit }
      );
      for await (const entry of iter) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
  } else {
    const iter = kv.list({ prefix: ["users"] }, { limit });
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      if (
        entry.key.length === 2 &&
        entry.key[0] === "users" &&
        typeof entry.key[1] === "string"
      ) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: results, count: results.length }),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    }
  );
}

async function handleDeleteUser(userId: string): Promise<Response> {
  const sanitizedUserId = sanitizeInput(userId);

  if (!validateKeyPart(sanitizedUserId)) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid userId" }), {
      status: 400,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  const userResult = await kv.get(["users", sanitizedUserId]);

  if (!userResult.value) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "User not found" }), {
      status: 404,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  const userData: any = userResult.value;

  await kv.delete(["users", sanitizedUserId]);
  await kv.delete(["users", sanitizedUserId, "role", userData.role]);
  await kv.delete([
    "users",
    sanitizedUserId,
    "department",
    userData.department,
  ]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_role", userData.role, sanitizedUserId]);
  await kv.delete(["users_by_department", userData.department, sanitizedUserId]);

  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true }), {
    status: 200,
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
  });
}

async function handleCreateProduct(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  try {
    const body = await req.json();
    const productId = sanitizeInput(body.productId || "");
    const name = body.name?.slice(0, 200) || "";
    const category = sanitizeInput(body.category || "");
    const price = parseFloat(body.price) || 0;
    const inStock = Boolean(body.inStock);

    if (!validateKeyPart(productId)) {
      return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid productId" }), {
        status: 400,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    const productData = {
      productId,
      name,
      category,
      price,
      inStock,
      createdAt: Date.now(),
    };

    await kv.set(["products", productId], productData);
    await kv.set(["products", productId, "category", category], productData);
    await kv.set(["products_by_category", category, productId], productData);

    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: productData }), {
      status: 201,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid request body" }),
      { status: 400, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
    );
  }
}

async function handleSearchProducts(url: URL): Promise<Response> {
  const productId = url.searchParams.get("productId");
  const category = url.searchParams.get("category");
  const limit = Math.min(
    parseInt(url.searchParams.get("limit") || "100"),
    1000
  );

  const results: any[] = [];

  if (productId && category) {
    const sanitizedProductId = sanitizeInput(productId);
    const sanitizedCategory = sanitizeInput(category);

    if (
      validateKeyPart(sanitizedProductId) &&
      validateKeyPart(sanitizedCategory)
    ) {
      const result = await kv.get([
        "products",
        sanitizedProductId,
        "category",
        sanitizedCategory,
      ]);
      if (result.value) {
        results.push(result.value);
      }
    }
  } else if (productId) {
    const sanitizedProductId = sanitizeInput(productId);

    if (validateKeyPart(sanitizedProductId)) {
      const result = await kv.get(["products", sanitizedProductId]);
      if (result.value) {
        results.push(result.value);
      }
    }
  } else if (category) {
    const sanitizedCategory = sanitizeInput(category);

    if (validateKeyPart(sanitizedCategory)) {
      const iter = kv.list(
        { prefix: ["products_by_category", sanitizedCategory] },
        { limit }
      );
      for await (const entry of iter) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
  } else {
    const iter = kv.list({ prefix: ["products"] }, { limit });
    for await (const entry of iter) {
      if (
        entry.key.length === 2 &&
        entry.key[0] === "products" &&
        typeof entry.key[1] === "string"
      ) {
        results.push(entry.value);
      }
    }
  }

  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({ success: true, data: results, count: results.length }),
    {
      status: 200,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    }
  );
}

async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const path = url.pathname;
  const method = req.method;

  const corsHeaders = {
    "Access-Control-Allow-Origin": "*",
    "Access-Control-Allow-Methods": "GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS",
    "Access-Control-Allow-Headers": "Content-Type",
  };

  if (method === "OPTIONS") {
    return new Response(null, { status: 204, headers: corsHeaders });
  }

  try {
    let response: Response;

    if (path === "/users" && method === "POST") {
      response = await handleCreateUser(req);
    } else if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "GET") {
      const userId = path.split("/")[2];
      response = await handleGetUser(userId);
    } else if (path === "/users/search" && method === "GET") {
      response = await handleSearchUsers(url);
    } else if (path.startsWith("/users/") && method === "DELETE") {
      const userId = path.split("/")[2];
      response = await handleDeleteUser(userId);
    } else if (path === "/products" && method === "POST") {
      response = await handleCreateProduct(req);
    } else if (path === "/products/search" && method === "GET") {
      response = await handleSearchProducts(url);
    } else {
      response = new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Not found" }), {
        status: 404,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      });
    }

    Object.entries(corsHeaders).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      response.headers.set(key, value);
    });

    return response;
  } catch (error) {
    const response = new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: "Internal server error" }),
      {
        status: 500,
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      }
    );

    Object.entries(corsHeaders).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      response.headers.set(key, value);
    });

    return response;
  }
}

serve(handler);
